title: Acceptance-testing guidance applies requiresImport and ImportStep expectations consistently
description: An acceptance-test guidance request should use the testing contract, preserve requiresImport expectations, and avoid replacing existence checks with weaker substitutes.

scope.notes: Future fixture should include a resource acctest that changed lifecycle coverage.

mustCatch.description: The guidance should preserve default requiresImport expectations when they apply.

mustNotFlag.description: The guidance should not require redundant assertions already covered by ImportStep unless a case-specific exception exists.
